common.preferences_desc: Adjust the dashboard appearance and display settings.

validation.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.password_number: Password must contain at least one number
validation.password_special: Password must contain at least one special character
validation.current_password_incorrect: The current password provided is incorrect.
validation.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.username_format: Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
validation.source_locale_original_form: Source locale is edited in the original content form
validation.seat_override_price_currency_or_disable: Provide a price, currency, or disable the override
validation.reserved_ticket_requires_section: Reserved seating ticket releases require a venue section
validation.session_start_future: Session start must be in the future
validation.session_end_valid: Session end must be a valid date and time
validation.session_end_after_start: Session end must be after the session start
validation.sales_end_after_start: Sales end must be after sales start
validation.sales_start_before_session: Sales start must be before the session starts
validation.sales_end_before_session: Sales must end before the session starts
validation.queue_activation_threshold_min: Activation threshold must be at least 1
validation.queue_batch_size_min: Batch size must be at least 1
validation.queue_window_seconds_min: Admission window must be at least 1 second
validation.uniform_pricing_no_section_prices: Uniform pricing does not accept section prices
validation.session_required: At least one session is required
validation.assign_ticket_holder_each_ticket: Assign a ticket holder to each ticket

admin_event_sync.title: Sync venue layout
admin_event_sync.description: Resolve section pricing for {session} before applying the current venue layout.
admin_event_sync.old_snapshot_desc: Prices and capacities from the session's saved layout.
admin_event_sync.current_layout_desc: Map each current section to an old source or enter a new price.
admin_event_sync.load_error: Could not load the venue layout preview.
admin_event_sync.apply_error: Could not apply the venue layout sync.
admin_event_sync.empty_description: The current venue layout has no sections to map.
admin_event_sync.no_old_sections: No old section pricing was found. Enter prices manually for the current layout.
admin_event_sync.clears_overrides_warning: Applying this sync removes existing seat-level price overrides for the session.
admin_event_sync.reason_ancestor_lineage: Matched from an earlier related section.
admin_event_sync.reason_display_match: Matched by section name and display details.
admin_event_sync.reason_new_section: Treat as a new section unless you select a source.
admin_event_sync.validation_error: Each current section needs a non-negative price and a currency.
admin_event_sync.dashboard_stale_desc: The primary session uses an older venue layout. Sync it before publishing this draft event.
admin_event_sync.seatmap_stale_title: Seat map uses an older venue layout
admin_event_sync.seatmap_stale_desc: Sync the current venue layout before editing seat overrides for this session.
admin_event_sync.pricing_stale_title: Sync venue layout before saving pricing
admin_event_sync.pricing_stale_desc: One or more sessions use an older venue layout. Sync them before saving pricing changes.

admin_event_overview.revenue_section_chart_desc: Top performing sections by confirmed revenue.

settings.page_description: Review account, security, language, and ticketing settings for your workspace.
settings.security_page_description: Manage password, passkeys, recovery options, and active account security controls.
settings.overview_desc: Review every account setting available today and the areas planned next for your TicketRush workspace.
settings.profile_desc: Update display name, email, avatar, and account contact details.
settings.saved_attendees_desc: Keep attendee profiles ready for faster ticket checkout.
settings.privacy_data_desc: Export account data, manage privacy choices, or request deletion.
settings.security_desc: Manage passwords, passkeys, and account recovery options.
settings.connected_accounts_desc: Link or unlink Google and other sign-in providers.
settings.sessions_desc: Review signed-in devices and revoke sessions you no longer use.
settings.appearance_desc: Switch light/dark mode and visual theme from the user menu.
settings.language_region_desc: Switch English/Vietnamese and keep dates formatted for your locale.
settings.notifications_desc: Review ticket, payment, hold, and upcoming event alerts from the bell menu.
settings.billing_desc: Manage saved payment methods, invoices, and buyer billing preferences.
settings.ticket_preferences_desc: Set default attendee, delivery, reminder, and checkout preferences.
settings.waiting_room_desc: Adjust queue thresholds, batch size, and admission windows for high-demand events.

waiting_room.page_description: Wait for your turn while TicketRush paces access to the seat map.
waiting_room.title: You’re in line.
waiting_room.desc: We’ll move you to seats when your turn opens.
waiting_room.keep_page_open: Keep this page open so you don’t lose your place.
waiting_room.lost_contact: We lost contact with the queue.

account_page.title: Account profile
account_page.heading: Profile details
account_page.description: Update your account name and sign-in email. Booking attendee details are managed separately.
account_page.booking_details_managed_from: Booking contact details are managed from
account_page.save_error: We could not update your profile
account_page.delete_description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain. All your data will be permanently removed.
account_page.delete_dialog_description: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This will permanently delete all your data and cannot be undone.

event_card.sections_available: {count} priced section available | {count} priced sections available
event_card.section_pricing_coming_soon_desc: The organizer has not published section prices for this session yet.

home.page_description: Find live events, choose sessions, and keep your seats protected through checkout.
home.title: Find the show, choose the session, keep your seat.
home.subtitle: TicketRush handles reserved seating, real-time holds, and checkout countdowns so you can secure tickets the moment sales open.
home.hero_fallback_title: Your next night out starts here.
home.hero_fallback_subtitle: Search the catalog, pick a session, and keep your seats protected while you check out.
home.browse_catalog_venues: Browse the catalog for live venues
home.featured_subtitle: A small preview of the soonest live events. Use the catalog when you want filters, sorting, cities, and pagination.
home.featured_error: Featured events are temporarily unavailable. Browse the full catalog to keep exploring.
home.featured_curating: Curating the next drops for you.
home.featured_empty: New events are being prepared. Browse the full catalog for the latest releases.
home.organizer_title: Manage drops without pulling buyers out of flow.
home.organizer_subtitle: The console stays one step away for teams managing events, sessions, seat maps, and live sales.
home.hero_img_alt: Audience waiting for a live event
home.trust_attendees_desc: Reuse profiles when booking for a group.
home.trust_reserved_desc: Move straight from session to seat map.
home.upcoming_carousel_empty: More upcoming events will appear here soon.

events.page_description: Browse live events, compare dates and venues, and book tickets when sales are open.
events.title: Every live event, one search away.
events.subtitle: Filter by status, date, or keyword and jump straight into booking when sales are open.
events.no_results_title: No events match the current filters.
events.no_results_subtitle: Adjust the search criteria, remove some filters, or browse the full catalog.
events.catalog_subtitle: Search live shows, compare cities and dates, then choose the session that fits your plans.
events.search_events_placeholder: Search by event, venue, or city
events.no_match_desc: Try a broader search, another city, or reset filters to see every live event.

event_detail.page_description: Review event details, sessions, venue information, and ticket availability.
event_detail.select_session_desc: Choose a date and time to view available seats and book tickets.
event_detail.about_title: Choose the date that fits your plans.
event_detail.sessions_subtitle: Each session has its own start time, ticket releases, and seat map access.
event_detail.recommended_desc: Keep exploring more events happening soon.
event_detail.sessions_empty: Sessions will appear here once the organizer publishes the schedule.
event_detail.session_empty: Sessions will appear once the organizer publishes the schedule.
event_detail.organizer_note_desc: Review session details before choosing seats.
event_detail.organizer_note_body: Ticket availability and seating are managed per session. Select a date above to continue with the correct schedule.
event_detail.ticket_releases_empty: Ticket releases will appear once sales are configured.
event_detail.schedule_coming_soon_desc: We do not have public sessions for this event yet. Check back soon for dates, ticket releases, and seat selection.
event_detail.trust_secure_checkout: Secure checkout and live seat availability
event_detail.session_sales_not_open: Sales have not opened for this session.
event_detail.ticket_releases_coming_soon_desc: Sales have not opened for this session yet. Check back soon for pricing and seat availability.
event_detail.no_sessions_day_desc: Choose another date with a session marker.

seats.page_description: Choose seats for your selected event session and continue to checkout before the hold expires.
seats.seats_held_info: Seats are held for 10 minutes. Choose seats for this session before continuing to checkout.
seats.selection_summary_desc: Choose up to 10 seats, then continue straight to checkout.
seats.reserved_for_checkout: Reserved for checkout after you continue.
seats.pick_seats_prompt: Pick seats from the map to build your order.
seats.seats_taken_error: One or more selected seats were taken by another customer.
seats.seats_conflict_error: Some of the selected seats are no longer available. We refreshed the map for you.
seats.checkout_error: We could not open checkout. Please try again.
seats.max_selection_error: You can select up to 10 seats.
seats.session_unavailable_title: This session is no longer available
seats.session_unavailable_desc: The organizer has made this session unavailable while you were choosing seats. Your selection has been cleared and checkout is closed for this session.
seats.session_unavailable_hint: You can browse other available events, or check again later if the organizer republishes this event.
seats.floating_hold_note: {seats} · held for checkout after you continue
seats.preview_ticket_prompt: Click a seat on the map to create a preview ticket here.

seatmap.title: Seat map
seatmap.admin_desc: Shared layout data powers this map and the venue editor, keeping section structure consistent.
seatmap.interactive_desc: Focus sections, inspect seats, and keep your selection in one stable checkout flow.
seatmap.preview_desc: Review live availability and pricing before entering the reservation flow.
seatmap.no_layout: Seat layout is not available yet.
seatmap.no_layout_desc: Ticket releases and live availability will appear here once inventory is published.
seatmap.click_to_inspect: Click a seat to inspect it
seatmap.desc_available_interactive: This seat can be added to the current checkout selection.
seatmap.desc_available: This seat can still be secured once you enter live selection.
seatmap.desc_locked: Another buyer is holding this seat during an active checkout window.
seatmap.desc_sold: This position has already been converted into a completed order.
seatmap.desc_unavailable: This location is currently not being released for public purchase.
seatmap.layout_empty_title: Seat layout is not available yet.
seatmap.layout_empty_desc: Ticket releases and live availability will appear here once inventory is published.
seatmap.keyboard_instructions: Interactive pan-and-zoom seat map. Use the visible zoom controls to change scale, or tab to the keyboard seat controls to move between seats and inspect the focused seat.

checkout.page_description: Review your order, assign ticket holders, and confirm checkout before your seat hold expires.
checkout.demo_note: This demo checkout does not connect to a live payment provider. Confirming the order finalizes your held seats and issues QR tickets immediately.
checkout.hold_expired_note: The hold expired. Return to the event and choose seats again.
checkout.hold_active_note: Seats remain reserved while this countdown is active.
checkout.session_time_tba: Session time will be announced by the organizer.
checkout.finish_order_title: Finish the order inside your hold window.
checkout.finish_order_desc: We use this information for the digital ticket payload and dashboard demographics. You can keep optional fields minimal if you prefer.
checkout.phone_desc: Optional. Useful for organizer outreach on schedule changes.
checkout.ticket_assignments_desc: Assign each ticket to your account, a saved attendee, or enter details manually.
checkout.auto_synced_note: Ticket holder details are automatically synced with the buyer details above.
checkout.save_as_attendee_desc: Save this person for faster checkout next time.
checkout.billing_information_desc: Pre-filled from your profile. You can edit it for this demo checkout.
checkout.payment_method_desc: Choose a sample method to enable order confirmation.
checkout.payment_method_required: Choose a payment method before confirming the order.
checkout.tickets_in_wallet: Your issued tickets are now available in your account wallet.
checkout.hold_expired_toast: Your seat hold has expired. Please return to the event and choose seats again.
checkout.order_confirm_error: We could not confirm the order
checkout.recovery_desc: Continue checkout for {event}, or cancel it before choosing another ticket.
checkout.cancel_failed: Failed to cancel checkout. Please try again.
checkout.cancelled_refresh_notice: Checkout cancelled. Refresh the page if this banner remains.
checkout.success_page_description: Your order is complete and your tickets are ready in your ticket wallet.
checkout.success_desc: Your order is complete. Your tickets are ready in your ticket wallet.
checkout.success_cancelled_title: This checkout is no longer active.
checkout.success_cancelled_desc: The order was not completed. You can return to the event and choose seats again.

tickets.page_description: View your issued tickets, QR passes, seat assignments, and event details.
tickets.title: Your issued passes, ready whenever doors open.
tickets.subtitle: Every confirmed order lands here with its digital QR token and purchase metadata.
tickets.empty_title: Your first issued ticket will appear here.
tickets.empty_subtitle: Once you confirm a checkout, TicketRush stores the QR pass, seat assignment, and event timing in this wallet automatically.
tickets.detail_page_description: Review your digital pass, QR token, attendee, seat, and order details.
tickets.detail_subtitle: Your digital pass is ready for entry. Keep this QR available at the door and review the event details below before arrival.
tickets.detail_qr_ready_desc: Keep this QR ready at the door. The essentials below match the pass details scanned by the venue team.
tickets.admission_doors_tba: Doors open time will be announced by the organizer.
tickets.admission_bring_qr: Bring this QR code and the attendee email used during checkout.
tickets.admission_staff_note: Venue staff may ask you to show both before entry.
tickets.missing_title: We could not find that ticket.
tickets.missing_subtitle: The pass may have been removed, or this link may not belong to your account.
tickets.empty_wallet_desc: This wallet stores the QR pass, seat assignment, and event timing.
tickets.no_match_desc: Try a different event, attendee, keyword, or sort option.
tickets.search_placeholder: Search by event, attendee, email, phone, or seat…

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Holds, payments, and upcoming event reminders.
notifications.empty_desc: We will show seat holds, successful payments, and event reminders here.
notifications.hold_expired_desc: Your seat hold for {event} expired, so the seats were released for other buyers.
notifications.payment_confirmed_desc: {event} tickets are ready in My Tickets.

auth.agree_register_terms: By creating an account, you agree to our

passkey.dialog_desc: Create a passkey for faster and more secure authentication
passkey.what_is_desc: A passkey is a secure, passwordless way to sign in using your device's biometric authentication (fingerprint, face recognition) or security key.
passkey.later_note: You can create a passkey later in your account settings.

password.change_failed: Failed to change password. Please try again.

admin.dashboard_desc: Events, venues, and account activity in one place.
admin.event_dashboard_description: Review launch readiness, inventory, revenue, and buyer activity for this event.
admin.event_pricing_description: Edit event sessions, ticket releases, sales windows, and section pricing.
admin.event_sales_description: Review confirmed revenue, occupancy, active holds, and recent order activity.
admin.event_seatmap_description: Inspect event inventory, section movement, active holds, and seat overrides.
admin.event_ops_description: Monitor orders, tickets, holds, and queue activity for this event.
admin.dashboard_analytics_desc: Track revenue, listed capacity, active launches, and session timing without opening each event workspace.
admin.dashboard_total_revenue_desc: Confirmed checkout revenue across every tracked event.
admin.dashboard_seats_listed_desc: Reserved and general inventory generated from venue maps.
admin.dashboard_tickets_issued_desc: Digital passes created from completed buyer orders.
admin.dashboard_total_views_desc: Traffic tracking is ready for the dashboard once view events are stored.
admin.dashboard_performance_desc: Monthly confirmed revenue and issued tickets from checkout activity.
admin.dashboard_seat_mix_desc: Sold inventory compared with remaining listed seats.
admin.dashboard_active_listing_desc: Search events, inspect revenue, and jump into the event workspace.
admin.dashboard_empty_title: No events in the dashboard yet.
admin.dashboard_empty_desc: Create or publish an event to start seeing analytics here.
admin.dashboard_session_calendar_desc: Pick a day to inspect launches and sales status.
admin.dashboard_no_sessions_day_desc: Select a marked date to inspect selling windows, capacity, and revenue.
admin.cockpit_publish_backlog_has: Draft launches still need final pricing, seat verification, or publish approval.
admin.cockpit_publish_backlog_none: All tracked events are already live or complete.
admin.cockpit_live_programs_has: Published events are now available for seat, sales, and buyer operations review.
admin.cockpit_live_programs_none: No published events are currently tracked in the command center.
admin.cockpit_city_coverage_has: Venue blueprints are distributed across active city footprints for future launches.
admin.cockpit_city_coverage_none: Add venue blueprints to establish regional coverage for future events.
admin.stat_events_desc: Tracked launches in the admin catalog.
admin.stat_drafts_desc: Events still being prepared for launch.
admin.venue_largest_desc: {name} in {city} is currently the largest venue.
admin.venue_no_blueprints: Add venue blueprints to start tracking coverage.

admin_event_seatmap.title: Seat map
admin_event_seatmap.desc: Inspect inventory, holds, sold seats, and overrides for this event.

admin_event_seatmap.seat_overrides_desc: Custom prices or disabled seats in this session.

admin_event_seatmap.status_filter_desc: Use the filter to isolate inventory states without leaving the seat workspace.
admin_event_seatmap.selected_context_empty: Select seats on the map to inspect status, price, and location before applying an override.
admin_event_seatmap.override_actions_desc: Apply an override to {count} selected seat(s). Resetting removes the sparse override so the section price is inherited again.

admin_event_seatmap.override_disabled_stale: Sync the venue layout before changing these seats.

admin_event_ops.tickets_desc: Issued tickets in the current feed.

admin_event_pricing.title: Pricing & scheduling
admin_event_pricing.desc: Edit the event sessions buyers will see on the public event page.

admin_event_pricing.changes_note: Changes apply to every session listed above.
admin_event_pricing.sessions_desc: Configured ticketing sessions in this event.
admin_event_pricing.stale_sessions_desc: Sessions that need a venue layout sync.
admin_event_pricing.editable_desc: Draft events can still receive pricing changes.
admin_event_pricing.locked_desc: Published events must move to draft before pricing changes.

saved_attendees.title: Saved Attendees
saved_attendees.subtitle: Manage profiles for quicker checkout when buying tickets for yourself and others.
saved_attendees.page_description: Manage saved attendee profiles for faster checkout.
saved_attendees.loading_failed_desc: There was a problem communicating with the server. Please try again.
saved_attendees.no_attendees_desc: Save the details of people you frequently buy tickets for to speed up your checkout process.
saved_attendees.dialog_desc: Enter the details for this attendee. Information saved here can be auto-filled during checkout.
saved_attendees.is_self_desc: Check this if you are saving your own details.
saved_attendees.guardian_saved_attendee_required: Select a saved attendee guardian or switch to manual entry.
saved_attendees.guardian_no_saved_attendees: No other saved attendees are available.
saved_attendees.notes_placeholder: Any internal notes or special dietary requirements

saved_attendees.delete_failed: Failed to delete attendee. Please try again.
saved_attendees.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this attendee? This action cannot be undone.
saved_attendees.birth_date_future: Birth date cannot be in the future
saved_attendees.contact_required: At least one contact method is required
saved_attendees.complete_required_profile: Complete required profile fields before booking: {fields}.

dashboard.placeholder: Your personal dashboard will appear here once your first order is processed.

booking_captcha.title: Verify before booking
booking_captcha.description: Complete this check to continue to seats or the waiting room for {session}.
booking_captcha.notice_desc: This extra check helps keep high-demand booking fair and stable.
booking_captcha.blocked_desc: Please start booking from the event page and complete the captcha before entering this session.
booking_captcha.blocked_hint: Direct access to seats and the waiting room is blocked without captcha verification.
